title: lilium catesbaei subsp. longii
intro: Lilium catesbaei subsp. longii, also known as Long's lily, is a rare subspecies of the lily plant native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits associated with Lilium catesbaei subsp. longii include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
